produced_artifacts.featurized_cache_dir: outputs/cache/featurized/  (one .pt per molecule, 16-char sha256 prefix; populated on demand)

feature_dims.atom_recipe_summary: 25 symbol + 8 degree + 6 formal_charge + 4 chirality + 6 num_h + 7 hybridization + 5 num_radical + 6 ring_size_multihot + 3 binary + 4 scalars

acceptance.idempotent_rerun: pass (second run logs 'skip: matching raw hash' and returns same parquet path)
acceptance.mypy_strict: clean (data/ files, with rdkit/pyg call-site error codes scoped via per-module override in pyproject.toml)

notes_for_consumers: Wave 2+ modules read outputs/splits/{dataset}/split.parquet (validated against SplitSchema).
task_1..task_K columns map back to original label names via outputs/data_manifest/{dataset}.json#task_rename.
Per-molecule featurized PyG Data objects are loaded from outputs/cache/featurized/{16-char-sha256}.pt; use transfermtl.data.featurize.cache_path_for(smiles) to resolve.
Raw CSVs are cached under data/raw/{dataset}/ so air-gapped reruns work after first download.
A5's latent partitioning will read A3's all-task checkpoint, not A2's outputs directly.
RDKit and torch_geometric are now hard dependencies in pyproject.toml; environment.yml already lists them via conda.
